name: Buttery Melt-a-Ways
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in flour, salt, and vanilla.
3. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until set but not brown.
5. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
